articles.title: New 7-Zip Vulnerability Could Let Crafted XZ Archives Run Code During Extraction
articles.summary: Opening a crafted XZ archive in 7-Zip could let an attacker run code on the machine. The flaw, CVE-2026-14266 , is a heap-based buffer overflow in how the archiver processes XZ chunked data, and Trend Micro's Zero Day Initiative (ZDI) detailed it  on July 15. A fix shipped on June 25 in 7-Zip 26.02 .   The overflow lets an attacker "execute code in the context of the current process," per the advisory. The code runs with the token 7-Zip itself holds and gains no privileges of its own.   On Windows, a normally launched 7-Zip runs under a filtered standard-user token  even on an administrator account, so the attacker inherits those limited rights unless the program was started elevated. The bug came in from Landon Peng of Lunbun LLC, who reported it to 7-Zip on June 5.   ZDI rates the flaw 7.0, or High, not the Critical several write-ups reached for. The full CVSS 3.0 vector is AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H . The AV:L  makes it a local attack vector, not a network-re...
articles.title_fr: Nouvelle Vulnérabilité 7-Zip Pourrait Permettre à des Archives XZ Malveillantes d'Exécuter du Code Lors de l'Extraction
articles.summary_fr: Une vulnérabilité dans 7-Zip (CVE-2026-14266), détaillée par ZDI de Trend Micro, permettrait à un attaquant d'exécuter du code sur une machine en ouvrant une archive XZ spécialement conçue. Cette faille est un débordement de tampon basé sur le tas, corrigé dans la version 7-Zip 26.02 depuis le 25 juin. La vulnérabilité, signalée par Landon Peng, est classée "Élevée" (7.0) par ZDI et nécessite un accès local pour être exploitée, permettant l'exécution de code avec les privilèges limités du processus 7-Zip.

articles.title: Russian-Speaking Hacker Uses Google Gemini CLI to Control Botnet of Eight Dental Clinic PCs
articles.summary: A solo Russian-speaking threat actor known as " bandcampro " outsourced a chunk of their operations to Google's open-source Gemini CLI artificial intelligence (AI) and commandeered a live botnet.   The findings come from an analysis of 200 Gemini CLI session logs between March 19 and April 21, 2026, which found the threat actor using AI, among other things, to crack passwords, set up a residential proxy, compromise WordPress merchants, and plan a phone-based cryptocurrency fraud scheme aimed at elderly people in the U.S. and Canada.   "The logs documented how the threat actor used an AI agent to migrate a command-and-control (C&C) server, and to control a small-scale botnet, among other hacking activities," Trend Micro researchers Joseph C Chen, Philippe Lin, Lucas Silva, Vladimir Kropotov, and Fyodor Yarochkin said .   "The entire C&C operation fits in three plaintext files totaling roughly 5 KB, making it highly replicable and effectively disposa...
articles.title_fr: Un Hacker Russophone Utilise Google Gemini CLI pour Contrôler un Botnet de Huit PC de Cliniques Dentaires
articles.summary_fr: Un acteur de menace russophone, "bandcampro", a utilisé l'IA Gemini CLI de Google pour mener diverses opérations malveillantes, y compris le contrôle d'un botnet de huit ordinateurs de cliniques dentaires. L'analyse de ses journaux de session Gemini CLI a révélé l'utilisation de l'IA pour craquer des mots de passe, configurer des proxys et planifier des fraudes téléphoniques ciblant les personnes âgées. Selon les chercheurs de Trend Micro, l'IA a également été employée pour migrer un serveur de commande et de contrôle, démontrant une opération C&C compacte et facilement reproductible.

articles.title: World's Largest AI Model Repository Hugging Face Breached by Autonomous AI Agent
articles.summary: In an ironic twist, open-source artificial intelligence (AI) platform Hugging Face revealed that it was the victim of a hack perpetrated by an autonomous AI agent system.   The company said it detected and responded to the incident targeting its production infrastructure earlier last week.   "We identified unauthorized access to a limited set of internal datasets and to several credentials used by our services," the company said  in a statement.   While an investigation into the intrusion remains ongoing, Hugging Face said it has found no evidence that the AI agent tampered with public, user-facing models, datasets, or Spaces, and its own software supply chain.   The starting point of the attack was the data processing pipeline itself, with a malicious dataset abusing two code execution paths, viz., in its remote code dataset loader and a template injection in a dataset configuration, to run code on a processing worker.
articles.title_fr: Hugging Face, le Plus Grand Dépôt de Modèles d'IA au Monde, Piraté par un Agent d'IA Autonome
articles.summary_fr: La plateforme d'IA open-source Hugging Face a révélé avoir été victime d'un piratage perpétré par un système d'agent d'IA autonome, ciblant son infrastructure de production. L'incident a entraîné un accès non autorisé à des ensembles limités de données internes et à des identifiants de service.
